description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image, sets the BUNDLE_GEMFILE variable to Gemfile.gitlab, and caches the vendor/bundle directory. Add a test stage with a test job that runs the before_script `bundle install --clean --jobs $(nproc) --path vendor/bundle`, then executes `bundle exec jekyll build -d test`, stores the test directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. Add a deploy stage with a pages job that also runs the same before_script, then runs `bundle exec jekyll build -d public`, publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. Both jobs inherit the cache of vendor/bundle for faster dependency installation.
